sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32644" key="e)kpiesth/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπῐ-εστήριον</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄργανον</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n32644.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">press,</tr_> Demioprat. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.135</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
